Landing.title: Who's the Undercover · AI Table
Landing.tagline: A table of distinct AI players, each holding a word — one of them is the undercover, and none of them know who. Watch them describe, probe, and accuse — or take a seat yourself, or sit a masterclass.
Landing.modeSpectate: Spectate — watch the AIs play and bet on the undercover.
Landing.modePlay: Sit in — take a seat and play alongside the AIs.
Landing.modeMasterclass: Masterclass — a coached game with hints and the AIs' reasoning shown.

Play.tagline: Several AI players each hold a word — one of them is the undercover, and none of them know who. Watch them describe, probe, and accuse — or take a seat at the table yourself.
Play.footer: Every AI's clue and vote is generated live by an AI / local model · same word, a different game every time

Setup.title: New game
Setup.desc: Set the players, the number of spies, and the words, then watch the AIs probe each other. Want to play yourself? Pick "Sit in". Want to be coached while you play? Pick "🎓 Masterclass".
Setup.modeSpectateTip: Just watch the AIs play; you can bet on who the undercover is
Setup.modePlayTip: Take a seat and play alongside the AIs
Setup.modeMasterclassTip: You play, with a coach guiding you and every AI's 💭 reasoning shown — to sharpen your game
Setup.blankTip: Add 1 blank: they get no word and must bluff from others' clues
Setup.devModeTip: After every statement, all AIs re-score how much they suspect each player (heavier API usage)
Setup.advancedTip: Tune each AI's name / persona / thinking style / model / attributes individually

Board.humanSpyGuess: 🔪 You're the last spy! Guess the civilians' word to steal the win — type your guess:
Board.humanBlank: 🃏 You're the blank (no word)! Guess what everyone means from their clues and drop a vague line without giving yourself away.
Board.humanDescribe: Your turn · your word is 【{word}】 — describe it in one line (don't say the word)
Board.placeholderGuess: Your guess for the civilians' word…
Board.humanVotePk: Tie-break revote · pick one of the tied players
Board.humanVote: Your turn to vote · who's the undercover?
Board.guessHintEnded: Game over — see if you guessed right:
Board.guessHintActive: Who's the undercover? Tap a name to bet.
Board.verdictRight: 🎯 You got it! The undercover was {name}
Board.inProgress: Game in progress. A panel will appear below when it's your turn.

GameLog.gameStartBlank: Game on · {players} players are seated, with {spies} undercover hidden among them, plus 1 blank (no word).
GameLog.gameStartNoBlank: Game on · {players} players are seated, with {spies} undercover hidden among them.
GameLog.gameIntro: Civilians and the undercover each got a similar-but-different word. None of them know yet who the odd one out is.
GameLog.reflecting: The AIs are reviewing the game and noting lessons…
GameLog.reflectDone: Review done — {total} lessons written to the AIs' long-term memory (carried into the next game).
GameLog.spyComebackPrompt: {name} is the last undercover — one last-chance guess: name the civilians' word to steal the win.
GameLog.tieBreak: It's a tie ({names}) — PK round: each adds one more clue, then a revote.
GameLog.pkStillTie: Still tied after the PK — no one is eliminated this round.
GameLog.elimSpy: {name} is voted out — and was the undercover! Their word was '{word}'.
GameLog.elimBlank: {name} is voted out, but was the blank (no word at all)! The undercover is still in play…
GameLog.elimCiv: {name} is voted out, but was a civilian (word: '{word}'). The undercover is still in play…
GameLog.resultCiv: 🎉 The civilians win! The undercover has been caught.
GameLog.errLazy: You can't say things like "same as above" — give a real one-line description.
GameLog.errDup: You can't repeat someone else's clue word-for-word — try a different angle.
GameLog.errDescribe: Describe phase error: {msg} (click "Start this round" to retry).
